description: Wowza provides video streaming products for live and on-demand delivery. Its offerings include a cloud video platform (Wowza Video) and self-hosted streaming server software (Wowza Streaming Engine).
summary: Wowza exposes two documented REST APIs: the cloud Wowza Video API authenticated by a bearer JWT, and the self-hosted Wowza Streaming Engine REST API authenticated with admin credentials via Basic or Digest auth; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
